title: Static variables in packages are duplicated in hierarchical mode or with --lib-create

features.name: package static variable shared across hier_block modules
features.description: Code should include a static variable declared at package scope that is referenced and modified from multiple modules, at least one of which is marked with verilator hier_block

features.name: verilator hier_block annotation
features.description: Code should include a module marked with the verilator hier_block attribute that accesses a package-level static variable
